item.title: This is a truly wacky post trying to convince us that it is progressive to have a diverse coalition of terrorists, I on the othe...
item.description:
This is a truly wacky post trying to convince us that it is progressive to have a diverse coalition of terrorists, I on the other hand beg to differ

item.title: Not only does it not make sense, but if it does happen, it will be a much less consequence than the extreme violence that we are...
item.description:
Not only does it not make sense, but if it does happen, it will be a much less consequence than the extreme violence that we are seeing out of the American empire anyway

item.title: It is hard to directly connect these , as the money still seems to be flowing, but the confidence and conflict are certainly con...

It is hard to directly connect these , as the money still seems to be flowing, but the confidence and conflict are certainly connected

item.title: What they mean is white
item.description:
What they mean is white. Like in the abstract what they mean is that they are a part of white supremacy, because there is absolutely no way to look at Israel and Turkey and Cyprus and Lebanon and say that one is more democratic than the other#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
